signals.title: 개인정보 보호법 일부개정
signals.summary: This amendment strengthens the organization and functions of the Personal Information Protection Commission and adjusts the composition and roles of the Personal Information Dispute Mediation Committee.
key_provisions: Strengthening the organization and functions of the Personal Information Protection Commission
Adjusting the composition and roles of the Personal Information Dispute Mediation Committee

signals.title: 개인정보 보호위원회 직제 일부개정
signals.summary: This amendment increases personnel to enhance the dispute mediation function and operate the personal information protection level evaluation system.
key_provisions: Increase in personnel for dispute mediation
Operation of personal information protection level evaluation system

signals.title: 정보통신망 이용촉진 및 정보보호 등에 관한 법률 시행령 일부개정령안 입법예고
signals.summary: This draft bill specifies the scope of services subject to approval for generating and processing linked information.
key_provisions: Specifies scope of services for linked information approval

signals.title: 전기통신사업법 시행령 개정: 인앱결제 강제 금지
signals.summary: This amendment prohibits app market operators from forcing specific payment methods, imposing fines for violations.
key_provisions: Prohibition of forced in-app payment methods
Fines up to 2% of sales for violations

signals.title: Amendments to the Enforcement Decree of the Network Act
signals.summary: This amendment establishes legal bases for connecting information services and mandates measures to prevent illegal information distribution.
key_provisions: Legal basis for connecting information services
Measures to prevent illegal information distribution
